articles.title: Kraft Group, Foxborough announce World Cup funding deal for Gillette Stadium security
articles.description:
"As part of this arrangement, the Town of Foxborough will not incur any cost or financial burden related to the FIFA World Cup."

The post Kraft Group, Foxborough announce World Cup funding deal for Gillette Stadium security appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kraft Group and Foxborough secure funding for Gillette Stadium's World Cup security.
Foxborough will not incur any costs for the FIFA World Cup in 2026.
Local residents benefit from reduced financial burden during the World Cup event.

articles.title: Natick mom to run the 2026 Boston Marathon for kinder communities
articles.description:
Danica Champion, a Natick mother of two and ESL teacher, is running her first marathon to support Spark Kindness.

The post Natick mom to run the 2026 Boston Marathon for kinder communities appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Natick mom Danica Champion will run the 2026 Boston Marathon.
She is raising funds for Spark Kindness, a local nonprofit.
Funds will support initiatives promoting kindness in Boston communities.
